_meta.client: 8 Hands Martial Arts Academy / The Qi-House
_meta.inputMode: web-fetch (breadth) + Claude-in-Chrome measured pass (computed styles & stylesheet @media)
_meta.referencePlatform: Finalsite CMS — flex-column layouts (fsStyleColumn), slick carousels (jQuery), minimal/CSS motion, NO GSAP/AOS
_meta.status: reference structural tokens MEASURED; skin tokens AUTHORITATIVE from brand directive

referenceStructuralTokens._note: MEASURED from live computed styles. Reuse the SCALE/RHYTHM; remap fonts+colors to client skin. Reference font 'Calibre' is licensed — do NOT use; substitute per skin tokens.

containers.sectionVerticalRhythm: large — bottom paddings ~120px observed on major bands; smaller utility rows ~34-46px

breakpoints._note: MEASURED from stylesheet @media frequency. Granular min-width ladder; map to a sane subset for the rebuild.

ctaButton_MEASURED.remapTo: Leadership Red #8C1D18 (used sparingly) or Navy primary per role mapping

cornerRadius_MEASURED._rule: match per-element to reference; deviate only per client's current prompt

layoutPrimitives_MEASURED.system: flex columns (fsStyleColumn-2 etc.), NOT CSS grid
layoutPrimitives_MEASURED.cardBands: multi-child flex-wrap rows (6 and 8 child column groups observed)
layoutPrimitives_MEASURED.motion: minimal; CSS + slick. No GSAP/AOS on reference. Our rebuild ADDS restrained GSAP scroll-reveal (CLAUDE.md §14).

clientSkinTokens._note: AUTHORITATIVE — from QI-HOUSE Brand & Design Guide. Map reference color ROLES onto these; apply the MEASURED scale above with these fonts/colors.

primaryNavy.role: primary / institution / dark bands / headings (replaces reference near-black #231F20)

academicGold.role: accent / excellence / hairlines, eyebrows, CTA accents

leadershipRed.role: action / sparing emphasis (replaces reference CTA red #B11D23)

slateGray.role: structure / secondary text / dividers (replaces reference body #373737)

accent.role: nav / CTA / data / eyebrows — uppercase +letter-spacing like reference h2

motionLibrary.name: GSAP
motionLibrary.usage: restrained scroll-reveal/easing; honor prefers-reduced-motion; stay subtler than a funnel
